statements.query: MATCH (c:ProxmoxCertificate {cluster_id: $CLUSTER_ID}) WHERE c.is_expired = true SET c.cert_risk = true, c.cert_status = 'expired'
statements.name: Mark expired certificates

statements.query: MATCH (c:ProxmoxCertificate {cluster_id: $CLUSTER_ID}) WHERE c.expires_soon = true SET c.cert_risk = true, c.cert_status = 'expiring_soon'
statements.name: Mark soon-to-expire certificates

statements.query: MATCH (c:ProxmoxCertificate {cluster_id: $CLUSTER_ID}) WHERE c.expires_in_days <= 90 AND c.expires_in_days > 30 SET c.cert_status = 'expiring_within_90d'
statements.name: Mark certificates expiring within 90 days

statements.__comment: Flag certificates using weak key sizes (< 2048 bits for RSA)
statements.query: MATCH (c:ProxmoxCertificate {cluster_id: $CLUSTER_ID}) WHERE c.public_key_type = 'RSA' AND c.public_key_bits < 2048 SET c.cert_risk = true, c.cert_weak_key = true
statements.name: Mark certificates with weak key sizes

statements.query: MATCH (c:ProxmoxCertificate {cluster_id: $CLUSTER_ID}) WHERE c.public_key_type IN ['DSA', 'DSS'] SET c.cert_risk = true, c.cert_deprecated_algo = true
statements.name: Mark certificates with deprecated algorithms

statements.__comment: Flag nodes with no certificates (unsecured web interfaces)
statements.query: MATCH (n:ProxmoxNode {cluster_id: $CLUSTER_ID}) WHERE NOT EXISTS { MATCH (c:ProxmoxCertificate {cluster_id: $CLUSTER_ID})-[:HAS_CERTIFICATE]->(n) } SET n.cert_risk = true
statements.name: Mark nodes without certificates
